'''Paulking XIV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Paulking system/Legends|Paulking system]] of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]]. It was renowned for its unusual [[Water/Legends|water]] life, which included [[fur-bearing trout]], [[flying crab]]s, and [[talking algae]].

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}
